metricComparisons.description: stronger contrast should increase visible stripe separation

expectedVideo: higher contrast should separate the oscillator stripes more aggressively
expectedAudio: higher contrast should sound more driven and brighter without collapsing the tone

Audio side is MANUAL REVIEW ONLY (no hard gate, downgrade 2026-05-18): the osc fixture's exported-audio spectralCentroidHz gate (>+30 Hz between contrast=0.7 and contrast=2.4 holds) was observed both passing and failing across reruns with deterministic negative deltas (-6.5, -19.1, -23.5 Hz) on failures. The osc source has the same low-energy/noise-floor problem as the solid source — exported-audio metrics like spectralCentroidHz are dominated by quantisation noise rather than the waveshaper output. Same precedent as audit-modulate-osc-sweep / audit-scrollX-osc-sweep / audit-colorama-solid-sweep / audit-hue-solid-sweep. The .webm and .wav captures still document the sweep for the listening pass.
manualChecks: Does the distortion character still feel intentional rather than harsh?
